certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No AI-specific risk assessment, impact analysis or bias evaluation processes defined
Missing transparency, explainability and audit trail requirements for AI-driven decisions
Insufficient provisions for ongoing AI system monitoring, performance drift detection and continual improvement
Lack of explicit data governance, quality and provenance controls for any ML components
recommendations: Map existing escalation rules to ISO/IEC 42001 AI risk and impact assessment requirements
Add mandatory human oversight checkpoints and decision logging for all AI outputs
Implement AI performance metrics, drift monitoring and periodic re-validation procedures
Establish data governance policies covering training/validation data used by the hybrid agent

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No AI-specific risk assessment, impact analysis or bias evaluation processes defined
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
